message:
test: comprehensive unit test expansion (95+ new tests)

Beads completed:
- bd-h3gn: ANSI sequences constants tests (55 tests)
- bd-2fv0: Porter-Duff alpha blending tests (14 tests)
- bd-cycm: Renderer diff algorithm tests (14 new tests)
- bd-1rxc: Renderer hit grid tests (12 new tests)

Test coverage improvements:
- src/ansi/sequences.rs: Full coverage of all ANSI escape sequences
  (CSI, OSC, cursor control, screen control, mouse, sync output)
- src/color.rs: Porter-Duff blending edge cases, numerical stability,
  formula verification, commutativity checks
- src/renderer/diff.rs: Column changes, wide/tall buffers, precision,
  patterns, boundary conditions, threshold verification
- src/renderer/hitgrid.rs: Adjacent regions, widget IDs, edge cases,
  clone behavior, extreme dimensions

Also includes:
- ANSI output tests (src/ansi/output.rs, mod.rs)
- Terminal raw mode tests (src/terminal/raw.rs)
- CI workflow updates (.github/workflows/ci.yml)
- Test infrastructure updates (tests/common/, tests/fixtures/)
- Added tempfile dev-dependency for raw mode tests

All 755 tests passing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -381,6 +381,53 @@ jobs:
             target/test-artifacts/
           retention-days: 7
 
+  pty-tests:
+    name: PTY Tests
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    timeout-minutes: 30
+    steps:
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+
+      - name: Install Rust toolchain
+        uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@nightly
+
+      - name: Cache cargo
+        uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@v2
+
+      - name: Build demo_showcase binary
+        run: cargo build --bin demo_showcase
+
+      - name: Run PTY E2E tests
+        run: cargo test --test pty_e2e --features pty-tests -- --nocapture --test-threads=1
+        env:
+          TERM: xterm-256color
+          HARNESS_ARTIFACTS: 1
+          HARNESS_LOG_LEVEL: debug
+          RUST_BACKTRACE: 1
+        continue-on-error: true
+
+      - name: Show PTY test summary
+        if: always()
+        run: |
+          echo "## PTY Tests" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          if [ -d "target/test-artifacts" ]; then
+            echo "Test artifacts generated." >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+            find target/test-artifacts -name "*.txt" -o -name "*.json" | head -20 | while read f; do
+              echo "- $(basename $f)" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+            done
+          else
+            echo "No test artifacts found." >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          fi
+
+      - name: Upload PTY test artifacts
+        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
+        if: always()
+        with:
+          name: pty-test-artifacts
+          path: |
+            target/test-artifacts/
+          retention-days: 7
+
   # Summary job that other workflows can depend on
   ci-success:
     name: CI Success

@@ -390,6 +390,7 @@ dependencies = [
  "ropey",
  "serde",
  "serde_json",
+ "tempfile",
  "tracing",
  "tracing-subscriber",
  "unicode-segmentation",

@@ -25,6 +25,11 @@ exclude = [
     "a.out",
 ]
 
+[features]
+default = []
+# Enable PTY-based E2E tests (require real terminal, slower)
+pty-tests = []
+
 [dependencies]
 bitflags = "2.10"
 libc = "0.2.180"
@@ -38,6 +43,7 @@ proptest = "1.9"
 insta = { version = "1.46", features = ["json"] }
 serde = { version = "1", features = ["derive"] }
 serde_json = "1"
+tempfile = "3"
 tracing = "0.1.44"
 tracing-subscriber = "0.3.22"
